name: Chicken Milan Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken breasts with flour.
2. Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
3. Add chicken to the pot and brown on all sides until cooked through. Remove the chicken and set aside.
4. Add chopped onion, celery, and carrot to the pot and sauté until lightly browned.
5. Return the chicken to the pot.
6. Stir in white wine and crushed tomatoes. Cover the pot and simmer for 15 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender.
7. Add parsley, garlic, salt, and pepper. Adjust seasoning if needed.
8. Arrange chicken and sauce on a warm platter. Garnish with additional parsley before serving.
